summary: Frontend testing of Vastgoed Kiosk module - 3 new features: direct redirect after login, Uitloggen button on Kiosk Welcome, Uitloggen button on Admin Dashboard. All 10 tests passed (100% success rate).

test_results.direct_redirect_after_login: PASS - After login, user is redirected directly to /vastgoed/{company_id} kiosk page
test_results.intermediate_page_skipped: PASS - 'Welcome Back' page with 'Open Kiosk' button is skipped after login
test_results.auto_redirect_when_logged_in: PASS - Visiting /vastgoed while logged in auto-redirects to kiosk page
test_results.uitloggen_on_kiosk_welcome: PASS - Uitloggen button visible at bottom left of Kiosk Welcome page
test_results.uitloggen_kiosk_works: PASS - Clicking Uitloggen clears token and redirects to /vastgoed login
test_results.uitloggen_on_admin: PASS - Uitloggen button visible in Admin Dashboard header
test_results.uitloggen_admin_works: PASS - Admin Uitloggen clears token and redirects to /vastgoed login
test_results.beheerder_button_present: PASS - Beheerder button still present on Kiosk Welcome page
test_results.start_button_present: PASS - Start button still present on Kiosk Welcome page
test_results.terug_naar_kiosk_present: PASS - 'Terug naar Kiosk' button still present on Admin Dashboard
test_results.kopieer_url_present: PASS - 'Kopieer Kiosk URL' button still present on Admin Dashboard

features_tested: After login on /vastgoed, user is redirected directly to /vastgoed/{company_id} kiosk page
Intermediate 'Welcome back' page with 'Open Kiosk' button is skipped after login
If already logged in and visiting /vastgoed, redirect to kiosk page automatically
Kiosk welcome page (/vastgoed/{company_id}) shows 'Uitloggen' button at bottom left
Kiosk welcome page 'Uitloggen' button works (clears token and redirects to /vastgoed login)
Admin Dashboard (/vastgoed/admin) shows 'Uitloggen' button in header
Admin Dashboard 'Uitloggen' button works (clears token and redirects to /vastgoed login)
Kiosk welcome page still shows 'Beheerder' and 'Start' buttons
Admin Dashboard still shows 'Terug naar Kiosk' and 'Kopieer Kiosk URL' buttons
critical_code_review_comments: CompanySelect.jsx correctly navigates to kiosk page after login (line 185)
CompanySelect.jsx correctly auto-redirects logged-in users to kiosk page (line 34)
KioskWelcome.jsx has Uitloggen button with data-testid='kiosk-welcome-logout' (line 69)
KioskAdminDashboard.jsx has Uitloggen button with data-testid='admin-logout-button' (line 175)
Both Uitloggen buttons correctly clear localStorage token and navigate to /vastgoed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified working: 1) Direct redirect after login to kiosk page (intermediate page skipped), 2) Uitloggen button on Kiosk Welcome page (data-testid='kiosk-welcome-logout'), 3) Uitloggen button on Admin Dashboard (data-testid='admin-logout-button'). Both Uitloggen buttons clear localStorage token and redirect to /vastgoed. Tuya circuit breaker API is MOCKED in backend.

mocked_apis.note: Tuya circuit breaker API in kiosk.py is MOCKED
